---
title: "Kaisa"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: FALSE

library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(polite)
```


## Getting lists of parks
```{r}
robotstxt::paths_allowed("https://stateparks.com/")


session <- bow("https://stateparks.com/minnesota_parks_and_recreation_destinations.html", force = TRUE)

mn_parks <- read_html("https://stateparks.com/minnesota_parks_and_recreation_destinations.html")

parks_list <- html_nodes(mn_parks, "#parklink a")

parks_text <- html_text(parks_list)
```

## test - writing a formula
```{r}
parks_text[[1]] |>
  str_to_lower() |>
  str_replace_all(" ", "_")
```
